title: castilleja pilosa
intro: Castilleja pilosa, also known as Downy Indian Paintbrush, is a flowering plant species in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It is known for its vibrant red and yellow flowers, which resemble a paintbrush. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Castilleja pilosa include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting digestive health, with herbal preparations often involving infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
